rationale: The cited paper appears only once, as one item in a grouped list of post-2020 JMR topics in the historical review section ("deceptive claims using fake news advertising"). The editorial does not discuss Rao (2022)'s findings, methods, or mechanisms, and it is not used to build a specific conceptual argument beyond illustrating topic breadth. This is a background/example citation rather than a meaningful intellectual dependency for the paper's core framework.
